title: Terraria Soundtrack
description: Replaces Minecraft's background music with Terraria's
body:
# Terraria Soundtrack V1.0
Terraria's music is a work of art and I always wanted to add it to Minecraft, But after hours of searching I couldn't find someone who did it already, So I decided to make it myself.

This resource pack contains most of Terraria's OST tracks and one or two Otherworldly tracks.           
### Each dimension has its own themed tracks 

Hell and Dungeon tracks for the nether.    
Hallow, Forest, Town, Underground, Ocean, Jungle Temple & title screen tracks for the Overworld.   
Space & Aether tracks for the End.              
Moon Lord track for the Ender Dragon fight & Journey's End track for the credits

### Must use Mods

Infinite Music Mod to take away the wait between tracks: [https://modrinth.com/mod/infinite-music](https://modrinth.com/mod/infinite-music)
Music Notification Mod so you can play certian tracks: [https://modrinth.com/mod/music-notification](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-notification)
